page_metadata.biotools__summary: DeepKhib is a web server that could predict lysine 2-Hydroxyisobutyrylation sites. it takes protein sequence data as input and uses one-hot encoding scheme and One-Dimensional Convolution Neural Network.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DeepKhib is a web server that could predict lysine 2-Hydroxyisobutyrylation sites. it takes protein sequence data as input and uses one-hot encoding scheme and One-Dimensional Convolution Neural Network.
